# Module 1: Getting Started {.unnumbered}

This module introduces the course, the tools, and the Python foundations you'll use throughout the semester. By the end of Week 1, you'll have a working Python environment, understand the data science ecosystem, and be comfortable running code in Jupyter notebooks.

## Learning Objectives {.unnumbered}

By the end of this module, you will:

- Explain why coding and data skills matter and adopt a growth mindset toward learning to program
- Recognize the role of GenAI tools (e.g., ChatGPT) in the learning process
- Set up a working Python environment using Google Colab, Anaconda, or VS Code
- Identify and use Python's basic data types: numbers, strings, and booleans
- Store and retrieve values using variables and use comparison operators to write logical expressions

## Module Resources {.unnumbered}

### Lecture {.unnumbered}

| Resource | Link |
|----------|------|
| 📊 Week 1 Slides | [View slides](../slides/week-01.html){target="_blank"} |

### Chapters & Notebooks {.unnumbered}

Each chapter has a companion Colab notebook with all the code from the chapter — ready to run, no installation required.

| Chapter | Topic | Colab Notebook |
|---------|-------|---------------|
| 1 | Introduction | — |
| 2 | Preparing for Code | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/bradleyboehmke/uc-bana-7025/blob/main/notebooks/examples/01_first_notebook.ipynb){target="_blank"} |
| 3 | Python Basics | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/bradleyboehmke/uc-bana-7025/blob/main/notebooks/examples/02_python_basics.ipynb){target="_blank"} |

### Lab {.unnumbered}

| Resource | Link |
|----------|------|
| 📊 Week 1 Lab Slides | [View slides](../slides/week-01-lab.html){target="_blank"} |
| 🧪 Lab 1: Python & Jupyter Orientation | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/bradleyboehmke/uc-bana-7025/blob/main/labs/lab-01-intro.ipynb){target="_blank"} |

### Reference {.unnumbered}

| Resource | Link |
|----------|------|
| 📋 Module 1 Cheat Sheet | [View cheat sheet](module-01-cheatsheet.html){target="_blank"} |
